basic_details.job_title: DHFWS Udupi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 17 Medical Officer and ANM/ PHCO Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Health and Family Welfare Society Udupi (DHFWS Udupi)
basic_details.short_information: District Health and Family Welfare Society Udupi (DHFWS Udupi) Medical Officer and ANM/PHCO Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of DHFWS Udupi. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the DHFWS Udupi Recruitment 2026 for Medical Officer (MBBS) and ANM/PHCO posts.

qualification.details: Medical Officer (MBBS): MBBS degree from a recognized institution. ANM/PHCO: ANM from a recognized institution by the Karnataka Government.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DHFWS Udupi recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted from 04 June 2026 to 11 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend within this period.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the DHFWS Udupi recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Medical Officer (MBBS) and ANM/PHCO.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for the Medical Officer and ANM/PHCO posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post is an MBBS degree from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the ANM/PHCO post?
faq.answer: For the ANM/PHCO post, candidates must have completed ANM from an institution recognized by the Karnataka Government.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Officer post is Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the ANM/PHCO post?
faq.answer: The salary for the ANM/PHCO post is Rs. 15,667/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the DHFWS Udupi office. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DHFWS Udupi recruitment?
